mydrugs.dose.drug.overdose_to_very_high: You're coming back from the edge.

screen.mydrugs.machine_transfer.no_ports: No transfer ports configured for this machine
message.mydrugs.transfer_upgrade.require: Install a Machine Transfer Upgrade first.
message.mydrugs.transfer_config.unsuppor: This menu does not support transfer configuration.
message.mydrugs.energy_upgrade.has_autom: This machine already has an Automation Upgrade.
message.mydrugs.energy_upgrade.unsupport: This machine does not support this upgrade.
message.mydrugs.automation_upgrade.has_e: This machine already has an Energy Upgrade.
message.mydrugs.automation_upgrade.unsup: This machine does not support this upgrade.
screen.mydrugs.addiction_debug.title: Addiction Debug
message.mydrugs.diary.0: I wrote it down. It feels a little lighter now.
message.mydrugs.diary.1: Some thoughts stop screaming once they are on paper.
message.mydrugs.diary.2: Today I chose to put it into words.
message.mydrugs.diary.3: The page understood what I could not say out loud.
message.mydrugs.diary.4: Writing it down made the noise inside me quieter.
message.mydrugs.diary.5: Not everything is fixed, but at least it is named.
message.mydrugs.withdrawal_hint.safe_zon: You feel safer here. Staying near a recovery anchor helps calm the withdrawal.
This place steadies you. Resting near an anchor makes the symptoms easier to bear.
The anchor helps your body settle. Staying here for a while will make this easier.
message.mydrugs.withdrawal_hint.food_hav: You should eat something. Food will help you hold yourself together.
You need fuel. Eat now before the withdrawal gets heavier.
Your body needs food. A proper meal will make this easier to endure.
message.mydrugs.withdrawal_hint.food_nee: You are running on empty. Find something to eat as soon as you can.
Hunger is making this worse. You need food.
Your body is starving. Try to find anything to eat.
message.mydrugs.withdrawal_hint.health.0: Your body is exhausted. Recovering health will make the stress easier to bear.
message.mydrugs.withdrawal_hint.health.1: You are badly hurt. Healing up will help you resist the withdrawal.
message.mydrugs.withdrawal_hint.health.2: Pain is making everything worse. Take care of your body first.
message.mydrugs.withdrawal_hint.diary_ha: Writing would help right now. Use your diary and get the thoughts out.
Your mind is spiraling. Writing in your diary could steady you.
Put it into words. Your diary can help you calm down.
message.mydrugs.withdrawal_hint.diary_ne: Writing things down can help organize the noise in your head.
Putting your thoughts into words would help you steady yourself.
Journaling could help you regain control for a while.
message.mydrugs.withdrawal_hint.headphon: Put your headphones on. Music could calm the stress a little.
Your headphones could help right now. A familiar track might steady you.
Try your headphones. Music can make the stress easier to endure.
A little music could help quiet the stress.
Something familiar to listen to would help you calm down.
Calming music might make the withdrawal easier to bear.
message.mydrugs.withdrawal_hint.social.0: Being around others helps. Isolation makes withdrawal harder.
message.mydrugs.withdrawal_hint.social.1: You do better with people nearby. Do not stay alone too long.
message.mydrugs.withdrawal_hint.social.2: Companionship helps steady you. Others can make this easier to endure.
message.mydrugs.withdrawal_hint.sleep.0: Withdrawal is keeping you awake. Lowering the stress may help you sleep later.
message.mydrugs.withdrawal_hint.sleep.1: Your body wants rest, but the withdrawal is fighting it. Calm down first if you can.
message.mydrugs.withdrawal_hint.sleep.2: You are too restless to sleep right now. Try to settle yourself before trying again.
Small things help: food, rest, safety, music, writing, and staying near others.
You can soften this a little: eat, calm down, stay safe, and do not isolate yourself.
This will not vanish instantly, but food, rest, company, and grounding habits all help.
Take care of the basics first. Food, safety, rest, and comfort all matter right now.
message.mydrugs.withdrawal_hint.drug_nee: Just a hit of %s, anything to make this stop...

Build the pipes, pumps, and upgrades needed for an automated workshop.

Form the psychotrope system, generate power, and feed a machine with it.

advancement.mydrugs.challenges.deep_prod: Finish a late industrial chain without exposing its details too early.

tooltip.mydrugs.psy_receptacle: A vessel for the first imprint. Used to forge the Psy Anvil.
tooltip.mydrugs.progression_guide: A field guide for the full MyDrugs progression path.
tooltip.mydrugs.mycelial_resonator: It hums toward places where the ground dreams.
message.mydrugs.mycelial_resonator.use: The hum points toward damp, strange ground. The research is still incomplete.
message.mydrugs.knowledge.caffeine: Your hands will not stop moving. The Psy Receptacle wakes with them.
message.mydrugs.knowledge.nicotinic: Your lungs have signed the tutorial waiver.
message.mydrugs.knowledge.cannabinoid: Your thoughts are buffering... and copper suddenly feels negotiable.
message.mydrugs.knowledge.fermented: You have discovered structural confidence. Heavy iron unlocked.
tooltip.mydrugs.insulated_wire.fermented: Gosh, I drank too much. I made a mess with my copper and ended up with this.
What is it even for? I tried making it again while drinking, but it led to nothing.
Maybe the first time only worked because of that overstimulation.
Stimulation might be the key. I should find out quickly.
message.mydrugs.knowledge.stimulant: Your neurons formed a committee and immediately overclocked it.
message.mydrugs.knowledge.lysergic: The walls submitted a circuit diagram. It was correct.
message.mydrugs.knowledge.overclocked: The lab heard boss music and started working faster.
message.mydrugs.knowledge.mycelial: You found the valley. The valley found you back.
message.mydrugs.knowledge.steel_plating: Iron and coal: the resin in your lungs whispers a forge formula.
message.mydrugs.knowledge.blocked.generi: Your mind has no receptacle for this yet. Start smaller.
message.mydrugs.knowledge.blocked.mushro: The valley speaks, but you do not yet know the language.
message.mydrugs.clay_vat.needs_heat: The clay vat needs heat below it.
message.mydrugs.clay_vat.not_enough_wate: Add at least 250 mB water first.
message.mydrugs.clay_vat.not_enough_powd: Need %s coffee powder for this batch.
message.mydrugs.psy_anvil.no_recipe: The Psy Anvil squints at those items and refuses to improvise.
message.mydrugs.psy_blueprint.unsupporte: The blueprint finds no matching structure here.
Unlock nicotinic knowledge and wake the Psy Receptacle.
advancement.mydrugs.knowledge.cannabinoi: Unlock cannabinoid knowledge for Psy Anvil copper shaping.
advancement.mydrugs.knowledge.first_hash: Use the cannabis resin and stomp path to make hash.
advancement.mydrugs.knowledge.steel_plat: Consume hash and unlock the Psy Anvil steel plating path.
Unlock fermented knowledge for heavy iron shaping.
Unlock stimulant knowledge for insulated wire shaping.
advancement.mydrugs.knowledge.lysergic.d: Unlock lysergic knowledge for advanced circuit shaping.
advancement.mydrugs.knowledge.overclocke: Unlock overclocked knowledge for the resonator path.
advancement.mydrugs.knowledge.mycelial.d: Unlock mycelial knowledge for future tolerance mutation hooks.
advancement.mydrugs.psy_anvil.obtain_rec: Receive a Psy Receptacle from the first imprint.
advancement.mydrugs.psy_anvil.craft_psy_: Craft the Psy Anvil and start shaping knowledge into components.
advancement.mydrugs.psy_anvil.shape_copp: Shape copper plates on the Psy Anvil.
advancement.mydrugs.psy_anvil.shape_heav: Shape heavy iron on the Psy Anvil.
advancement.mydrugs.psy_anvil.shape_insu: Shape insulated wire on the Psy Anvil.
advancement.mydrugs.psy_anvil.shape_adva: Shape an advanced control circuit on the Psy Anvil.
advancement.mydrugs.psy_anvil.build_reso: Build the resonator placeholder for future valley assistance.
message.mydrugs.cocaine.prepare.invalid_: The powder needs a flat, solid surface.
message.mydrugs.cocaine.prepare.too_care: You need to prepare it properly first.
screen.mydrugs.psy_mixer.help.setup: Place an offering, material, and vessel, then begin the ritual.
screen.mydrugs.psy_mixer.help.ready: Ready. Begin the ritual, then tap on the gold timing zone.
screen.mydrugs.psy_mixer.help.running: Tap when the moving marker reaches the gold zone.
screen.mydrugs.psy_mixer.help.running_fo: Focus the %s. The three gold gates drift and breathe; tap when the marker crosses one.
tooltip.mydrugs.vanilla_biome_finder.emp: No biome selected. Sneak-right-click to choose.
screen.mydrugs.biome_finder.title: Biome Finder
message.mydrugs.biome_finder.not_found: The biome was not found within reach.
message.mydrugs.biome_finder.arrived: You stand within the chosen biome.
message.mydrugs.biome_finder.excluded: That biome is forbidden to the seeker.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.awaken: The Psy Mixer awakens. You should not take this lightly. Immense respect and perseverance are required.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.activation.1: The bowl accepts the pearl. Something ancient opens its eyes.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.activation.2: The circle breathes for the first time.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.activation.3: The gods have noticed the shape you built.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.activation.4: A sacred mechanism stirs beneath the vines.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.invalid.1: The shape is wrong. The gods do not answer malformed prayers.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.invalid.2: This is not a ritual. This is clutter arranged with confidence.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.invalid.3: The bowl stays silent. Something is missing.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.invalid.4: The gods looked away before the offering began.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.start.1: The gods are looking at what you are doing. Do not mess this up.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.start.2: The circle breathes. Keep your hands steady.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.start.4: The bowl begins to remember what you placed inside.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.success.2: The ritual settles. The mixture has found its form.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.success.4: You showed respect. The offering returns changed.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.fail.1: You failed. Your clumsiness disappointed the gods.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.fail.3: The gods turn away from your hands.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.fail.4: The offering breaks under your lack of discipline.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.fail.5: Something sacred was almost understood. Almost.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.no_recipe.1: The ingredients do not recognize each other.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.no_recipe.4: This is not a prayer the gods understand.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.missing_knowle: You do not yet understand this offering.
The mixture refuses you. Knowledge must be earned.
The gods do not explain themselves twice.
You are asking a question your body has not learned.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.missing_dose.1: Your body has not suffered this lesson deeply enough. Required: %s, current: %s.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.missing_dose.2: The gods demand experience, not curiosity. Required: %s, current: %s.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.output_blocked: The result has nowhere to go.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.rupture.1: The ritual body is broken. The gods leave the room.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.rupture.4: The circle opens, and everything becomes ordinary again.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.timing_good.3: The gods remain silent. That is good.
message.mydrugs.psy_mixer.timing_bad.1: Your hand slips from the sacred pattern.
